commands.notes: Type-check passes with the tree provider implementation and tests.
Tree provider unit tests pass in Node test runner with a VS Code mock module.

verification.regression_notes: Added tree provider coverage for roots, sections, prompt nodes, context values, refresh event, and empty workspace behavior.

handoff.summary: Implemented a functional workpack tree view data provider with hierarchical nodes, status icons, unique IDs, context values, async file discovery, and file-system auto-refresh.
next_steps: Run manual VS Code validation for tree rendering and watcher-triggered refresh.
Integrate A4 status color/theme mapping if richer icon semantics are required.
known_issues: Manual UI validation for tree rendering and watcher behavior is not automated in this repository test suite.
